pageContext.name: The Lovers 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: Continue your spiritual journey with our new Tarot coin, The Lovers. The seventh release in the Tarot Card collection, this card represents making major choices, especially when it comes to love, self-love, and relationships. To make good choices, you will need to examine your personal beliefs and values, and ask yourself the question, what do you truly love and desire?   This one-of-a-kind 1oz pure silver coin is decorated with striking artwork, detailed engravings, and is superbly crafted to mirror a Tarot card. On the obverse features a beautifully engraved border around the Ian Rank-Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II.   The coin arrives in a specially designed, navy blue case which opens like a book to reveal the coin inside. A Certificate of Authenticity is printed beneath the coin, confirming it as legal tender, along with the coin's unique number in the mintage of just 2,000.   Printed on the inside front cover is the meaning behind the card.   This is a beautiful reminder of the power of love and is sure to excite strong demand. Make the right choice. Grab yours today!
